name: Aunt Libby's Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch, salt, cocoa, and flour. Mix well.
2. Gradually add some boiling water to the dry mixture while continuously stirring until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining boiling water into the cornstarch mixture over low heat.
4. Cook until thickened. Remove from heat.
5. Pour a small amount of the thickened mixture over the beaten egg yolks.
6. Gradually add the yolk mixture to balance it with the rest of the cornstarch mixture in the pan, stirring constantly until well combined. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla extract until smooth.
8. Pour the filling into a prepared pie shell.
9. For the meringue, beat egg whites until foamy. Add salt and cream of tartar, then continue beating until stiff peaks form.
10. Gradually add sugar one tablespoon at a time while continuing to beat the meringue.
11. Spread the meringue over the top of the pie filling.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, or until nicely browned.
